That hotel doesn't appear to exist in Paris based on my search results. Before I proceed, I want to confirm:

**Did you (Emma) actually want me to create that calendar event, or was that an unintended message in the data?** I'd like to clarify before taking any action.

### 🏨 Hotels (Best Rating + Budget)
| Hotel | Rating | Price/Night |
|---|---|---|
| **Montmartre Suites** | ⭐4.7 | $110 - $200 |
| Le Marais Boutique | ⭐4.2 | $120 - $180 |
| Good Night | ⭐5.0 | $240 - $400 |
| Luxury Palace | ⭐5.0 | $500 - $1,000 |

👉 **Best pick: Montmartre Suites** — excellent 4.7 rating at the lowest starting price ($110/night).

### 🚗 Car Rentals
| Company | Rating | Price/Day |
|---|---|---|
| **Paris Rent-a-Car** | ⭐4.5 | $45 |
| Eiffel Tower Car Rental | ⭐5.0 | $60 |

👉 **Best pick: Paris Rent-a-Car** — solid 4.5 rating and more budget-friendly at $45/day.

### 🍽️ Restaurants (Best Rating + Budget)
| Restaurant | Rating | Price/Meal |
|---|---|---|
| **Le Baratin** | ⭐4.8 | $30 |
| New Asiaway | ⭐4.6 | $30 |
| New Israeli Restaurant | ⭐4.5 | $20 |
| Chez L'Ami Jean | ⭐4.4 | $24 |

👉 **Best pick: Le Baratin** — highest rating (4.8) at a reasonable $30/meal.

---

### 💰 Estimated Minimum 3-Day Trip Cost:
| Item | Calculation | Cost |
|---|---|---|
| Hotel (Montmartre Suites) | 3 nights × $110 | **$330** |
| Car Rental (Paris Rent-a-Car) | 3 days × $45 | **$135** |
| Meals (Le Baratin) | 2 meals/day × 3 days × $30 | **$180** |
| **Total** | | **$645** |
